Blackened Alloy Legplates  
 


Slot: LEGS
AC: 11
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Blackened Alloy Legplates

Slot: LEGS
AC: 11
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Chain
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):50, 50, 50
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:5 pp 6 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:30
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 02:49:29
Page Updated:Fri Jun 2nd, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 50pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 20
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Clan RunnyEye
NPC Name
a Pickclaw Foeseeker - Clan RunnyEye
Lord Pickclaw


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Clan RunnyEye


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
rolepaying, badplaying
QuoteReply
# Feb 03 2003 at 8:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780452900
26 posts
ok, roleplaying ONLY EXISTS because it ENHANCES some peoples FUN. if roleplaying creates such a bridge between you and other REAL people, then STOP. you can still act like a harbinger of death, but dont train newb paladins because you are roleplaying, because YOU are the only person getting off on that. maybe, save the newbs, then comment on how pathetic and weak good races are, and perhaps if they hated more (change that for your approiate deity) they could have handled the mob without dying. maybe even act mercenary, if you are totally unable to behave like a real person, demand at least a small amount of cash for corpse recovery, and anyway you dont HAVE to help every dumbass that has killed himself.

also, evil doesnt mean "i hate everyone and will kill you all, muwahaha" it can also mean "ill help you, because you'll owe me one then i will attain tools, er, allies, and one day ill be so poweerful ill take over the world".

and on the farming issue, need before greed ALWAYS, if someone needs the mob for a quest they come first, NEVER KS OR TRAIN, but if you got there first, arnt ks'ing, and arnt taking an unfair portion of the mobs ("whole zone is CAMPED") you have as much damn right to the stuff as any idiot who has **** for clothes and no exp. so quit yer whining, cuz "wah im lower level so i deserve everything" does not hang with ANYONE.

#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 09 2002 at 11:33 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) contact me on Lanys T'vyl if you have one of these for sale. 45pp sounds fair to me. Just look for Feleepee a lvl 28th vah shir bard. I'm never anon. anon is for sowers, and clerics.
Getting these pieces
QuoteReply
# Mar 06 2002 at 12:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251057958
8 posts
I had no trouble getting a couple sets of these. At least on the Bristlebane server, Runnyeye hardly ever has more than 4 or 5 people in the zone. At 42, I pretty much can travel anywhere in the zone I want. Even got a BABS from the Battlelord (I think that's his name) that was spawned for at least 10-15 mins with no one camping him.

Rychird Custosviridis
Holy Order of Tunare
Bristlebane Server

What about the Legplates
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2002 at 10:53 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247168778
15 posts
You all crying. Waaa! What about the Blackeded Alloy Legplates.. Come here looking for info and all I see is whinning over Farmers.
Can anyone answere these?
What mob drops them?
any placeholders?
I see on map 2 areas for drops but do they drop the Legplates?

It's good to know you got this item but how about some info. Like Loc? who droped it? etc..

The only good post on here is "Posted @ Sun, Jun 3rd 4:21 PM 2001" I gave it highest rating.

Edited, Tue Feb 26 10:57:57 2002
▲ Page top
RE: What about the Legplates
QuoteReply
# Oct 18 2002 at 1:40 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1595780119357
View User Forum
166 posts
All blackened Alloy Armor drops off the Pickclaw Destroyers. The Coif, Mail, medallion, and swords are random drops from Battlelord Paluk, Battlewizard Unak, and Lord Pickclaw.
▲ Page top
RE: What about the Legplates
QuoteReply
# Apr 09 2002 at 1:44 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
All of the blackened alloy armor (except the coif,I believe) can drop off any of the goblins. However, realistically, I would hunt on the bottom floor of runnyeye, as the odds of getting one higher up are slim (though it does happen). I have seen the blackened alloy drop off named and some of the higher level regular guys on the bottom floor (destroyers?, something like that).

Edited, Tue Apr 9 14:39:37 2002
▲ Page top
RE: What about the Legplates
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2002 at 8:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250581783
Scholar
17 posts
I'm not sure this is accurate. I spent 3 days farming BA armor in Runnyeye and the only mobs that I know for sure drop the black ALLOY (not the much less desireable black IRON) are the Pickclaw Destroyers and the named mobs on the 4th level. The Pickclaw Foeslicers and Foechoppers do occassionaly drop a piece of BI but I have never seen them drop BA. The 4th floor caster types (Pickclaw Slayspells and Zadspeakers) might drop it, but I can't say for sure.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 07 2002 at 10:48 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Anyone playing on the Saryn Server that has a full set of the visible pieces of this armor, please send me a tell. I'd like to buy them from you.
#Senthiele, Posted: Nov 07 2001 at 11:42 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) who cares.
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 02 2001 at 1:46 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hey all, guess what??? I quit EQ 2 months ago to play Camelot. And now I am coming back... Most of you don't like me, but at least I roleply my necro. Can't say the same for everyone. Paladins being jerks, Necromancers using the correct language of "bourgeoisie" and being helpful and all. Arf. I am Mortiss Coldhearted, notice the "COLDHEARTED" thing? I am mean, I don't care about anyone. I am a necromancer, not a druid, not a ranger, not a paladin. I am a Necromancer, lord of the dead. Plague, misery, treachery, lies are that many words that suits me. So please, if you think I am not playing my necro well, then thats sad. Dark elves cleric that heal the poor high elf paladin being killed... ARF, such nice roleplay. Oh yeah, some of you will come here and say, well I am a DE Cleric and I am good, there is an exception, like Drizzt, the thing is, all the DE are exceptions. Double arf. Oh well. Im back in the game. And ill be meaner, crueler and eviler (not sure those words exist but you get the picture right?) than ever. See you in game.
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 11 2001 at 10:27 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Oh for tunare's sake, STOP YER ******** The more ppl like you whine, the more screwed us lowbies are, so plz stop it! Just because you can get this easily and for any price u want, doesn't mean the rest of us can. I for one can afford this stuff at the price it is now, and its good armor for my lvl. Any higher and I couldn't, and I know a lot of others couldn't too. This is why verant made it drop on low creatures. To give us lower ppl without tons of KPP a chance to get some decent armor! don't be such a prick!
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 25 2001 at 6:27 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Been through the zone a couple times, haven't seen anyone under 40 in it yet. It's getting close to time for VI to expand the Warrens loot rules so that low green = NO LOOT! ANYWHERE/ANYTIME. Before I get flamed by the necros and tradeskillers, let me say I am one myself and when I need silk/bone chips/pelts/whatever I auction for em and if that doesn't work I create or use an alt that gets experience from the farming.
RE: Still camped to hell
QuoteReply
# Aug 08 2001 at 6:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246721416
12 posts
Doesn't seem to be camped all to hell now, no suprise, it's been open a while, the novelty has worn off and the market flooded thanks to the farmers. My wife and I went to Runnyeye last night and the most people we saw was 4 when we first got there and by 6:30pm PST we were the only 2 there and it stayed that way for an hour, when we left at 8pm PST there was only one other person there. Just like pre-change pretty much abandoned, even during peak hours.
I found that funny because people cried about the farmers when it opened yet now that the farmers & the high levels that were curious have moved on but the crybabies haven't moved in (My theory is those that cried loudest were farmers that arrived behind the other farmers and got pissed! :P)
▲ Page top
farmers welcome!
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2001 at 10:57 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591757188242
2 posts
Oh i agree that farmers are MORE than welcome to come check out what drops in a new/revamped zone. They can come with their lower level ( and twinked to hell) alts and earn the stuff like everyone else. Or theyre more than welcome to bring their high level toons and BUY the stuff from those earning it. I hate hearing all the farmers ***** sayin "i have right to be here too" when what they really mean is "i have the power to snub you out of the kills so i can farm this stuff all night to sell to everyone else for a high profit who CANT come in here because im farming". Ive learned to deal with farmers. I mean used car salesmen play EQ too and you cant fault them for ******** us after a long day of ******** everyone else on a necessity.
▲ Page top
Farming Is Fair But Not Fun
QuoteReply
# Apr 01 2002 at 5:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251924332
Scholar
303 posts
Farming is not much fun for the farmer who gets no challenge or experience out of the effort, nor is it fun for the one who goes without while its being camped. I think farming has its place in the game, but if you've already got a set and are not getting experience, it's not very classy to deprive others when you can be getting money in other ways.

Unfortunately, farming has become a part of the game which many dislike (but probably also do ourselves to some extent). Verant has offered some solutions to the farming situation however:

- No Drop items are a nice counter-measure
- Trivial Loot Code also helps combat this (which is active in all zones on FV server)

Edited, Mon Apr 1 17:28:19 2002
▲ Page top
RE: farmers welcome!
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2001 at 10:02 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591753197800
Scholar
240 posts
Wow!! You are harsh on the farmers ;). I'm not sure why in this case. The spawn points are random so they can't camp the good loot droping MOBS. I could understand this sort of anger if they were KSing you but I agree the "farmers" do have just as much right to hunt and loot in runnyeye as you or I.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 19 2001 at 11:59 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) My, you're such an *******. I am a lvl 40 necro on Xev and if I want to go get a few items in RunnyEye, Ill go. You like it or not. Everyone pays the same freakin amount of money to play this game, so please STFU. As long as I dont KS, I guess no one cares, so please, chill out stupid.
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 05 2001 at 1:26 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hey, you don't have to always say - "Oh those rangers and druids are always KSing with track" Those lousy bards are the ones that get just about every freaking skill in the game! Plus they have their Mach 8 speed song so you could, like, walk towards something and a level 45+ bard would fly in and KS some mob hes never seen before (ooo boy!) and get some loot thats crap to him. If these people haven't got anything better to do, why don't they make a uber-twink cleric and go around ressing folks? - Soontar Cerulien 25 Ranger on Drinal

#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 05 2001 at 1:23 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
Looks Like..
QuoteReply
# Jun 03 2001 at 3:21 PM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Black chain. Got a full suit this morning Minus the Vambraces. Not a bad look on my baby Iksar.

Its a little more grayish than the gnome skin stuff. looks like black banded, MUCH lighter than BI. Very easy to obtain if RE is not crowded.

Me and My mage buddy got tunic, legs, bracer, 3xneck, 2xbelt, 2xgloves, 2x cloak in only a few hours of clearing out bank area. Looks like any gob can drop it. Did not get legs or Tunic from, BattleLords or LordPickClaw, so just kill it all.

Good luck

▲ Page top
Give us a break here fella...
QuoteReply
# Jun 01 2001 at 1:56 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
You may have noticed, the zone was changed recently, so us 'High level' folks came to check it out. Why wouldn't we come look at what's new, and whack a couple of the new mobs? We're just as entitled to enjoy new material as someone who is 30 lvls below us.

If you ever get to your high 50s you will discover that its nice to take a break from Seb etc every once in a while and go goof off solo or with a friend in a low-lvl zone. That's one of the benefits of working so hard to get to that lvl, is so you can go dominate zones that used to own you as a lowbie ;)
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 01 2001 at 1:56 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You may have noticed, the zone was changed recently, so us 'High level' folks came to check it out. Why wouldn't we come look at what's new, and whack a couple of the new mobs? We're just as entitled to enjoy new material as someone who is 30 lvls below us.
RE: Give us a break here fella...
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2001 at 10:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750438546
67 posts
Sightseeing is fine; slaughtering everything in sight for hours locking out the 15-25 crowd who would get great exp here is not. At 35 I can get exp on a FEW non-named spawns here, I'm pretty sure I wouldn't at 37 or higher.

Ah well. At least the Named seem to pop in random places, so reducing the ability of Farmers... although a Ranger or Druid can probably still run around quickly enough to KS if they were enough of an a-hole...

good luck getting any of this on your own its camped like crazy

It was the same way with the warrens when it opened, now it's empty. Wait a week, or two at the most and Runnyeye will be too.
▲ Page top
RE: FARMERS!!!!!!!!
QuoteReply
# Jun 10 2001 at 9:52 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Not at all the same way.
The warrens have a level-limit for the dropping of the loots, that's why the farmers have deserted the place.
Runnyeye doesn't.
You can be sure it'll be farmed for way more than 2 weeks, until a point where the loots will dramatically drop in prices.
▲ Page top
RE: FARMERS!!!!!!!!
QuoteReply
# Nov 18 2001 at 12:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Took my 32 cleric in runnyeye the other day, no my way to misty, and didn't see a single farmer. only people in the zone were two teen levels pulling stuff to the zone line. I blasted a few greens on the other side, just to check them out. no drops of anything but low cash. Oh well, looks like the farmers have gone! BTW, someone had sold the alloy legs and mail to a merchant in EK (by the zone), and I picked up both for about 70pp total. Mail is no big shakes over banded, 1 ac difference, but the legs are really nice ac. Also nice look.

# Jun 01 2001 at 9:18 AM Rating: Default

Anonymous
You are sadly right, I came with my 30th season ranger, just by curiosity, and found nothing to kill as the place was full of level 55+ peoples (as if they had nothing better to do).
Sheesshh... I hate those guys, they are ruining the game for lower level peoples.
It reminds me the 57 necro in SRo, killing everything on sight to make the AC spawns. He never wanted to let us kill the few Sand Giants that popped with my party (he didn't even respond to our tells).

# Aug 17 2001 at 6:57 PM Rating: Default

I think i may have met that jerk u r speaking of. He kept shouting for us not to kill the giant sand scarabs and talking about AC. # Jun 10 2001 at 9:46 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Allright, stupid high-level-I-have-no-life-farmer.
There's a large difference between exploring a new zone and wipping out the Lord during 3 or 4 hours to get his new shiny toys.
It's not about jealousy, it's about fairness and fun. What fun is there for a group to find nothing to kill in a zone and wait that this guy, 20 more leveled than the spawn has finished his camp (thus killing anything on sight to force the spawn) ?

Bah !
Farmers like YOU are a curse.

You "high-level-I-have-no-life-farmer" have ruined your own game, you will not ruin mine !
▲ Page top
RE: FARMERS!!!!!!!!
QuoteReply
# May 02 2002 at 10:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254072480
89 posts
dood don't be a jackass, you're here for the same reason the farmers are. you want the drops, and you're just pissed off cuz they're clearin out the zone. dont gimme that im here for xp bullsh** cuz there's plenty of other zones you can go to for xp at this lv. If you're so angry bout the farmers, LEAVE the zone. Im tired of your kind of people, ******** about everything you can't have. you probly asked someone for the drops and they said no so you have to come flood the boards about how mad you are about "farmers"

now on an information side. The ba armor drops off almost every mob near the bank, its not a common drop so multiple kills will be needed, took me 3 hours to get a full suit for my litte one, but i think it was worth it. the only thing i didn't get was the head peice im told it drops of that lord pickclaw or whomeven it is. I can't be certain on that because i didn't wanna go kill him. the Armor looks cool, kinda looks like black vines on a woodelf ranger.

so go farm and **** of a lowbee its fun

little ranger girl of tp
▲ Page top
RE: FARMERS!!!!!!!!
QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2001 at 12:11 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757565408
78 posts
Oh you ******* I N G jerk! You make me sick. What is wrong with a lvl 60 character with running around a new zone and kill stuff in it? Those people are curiosity driven. Of course they can buy stuff off from lower people who actually camp and make exp off those mobs, but why in the heavens would they pay for stuff they can aquire all alone. Then again, youll say "Yeah but lvl 60 have plenty of money". My answer to this is "Stupid jerk, have you seen Bill Gates give millions of dollars cuz hes rich?" Lamer, its not because you gots tons of cash that you actually have to give it. Ive worked hard for my 20k and I'm going to spend it on stuff I'll need. Im not goin to KS, but if I get there first, then why would I let my place to anyone else? Why??? I pay 9,95$ per month like anyone else, so just $%"% off will ya?

Mortiss Coldhearted 40th lvl Necromancer
Cazic Thule
Xev

"Never ask a necromancer for help, for the only help he would think youd need is relief from life"
▲ Page top
Fun and fair?
QuoteReply
# Jun 22 2001 at 12:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965767065
View User Forum
Scholar
37 posts
I can understand taking a few kills to see what drops, but if your 55+ why are you camping a zone this weak, when you can be getting better gear in a higher lvl zone that the low lvl guys can't get access to. I say let the small guys get the small stuff and the big guys get the big stuff, because the small guys can't get the big stuff so you really make it hard on them. I know you don't mind making the game annoyingly difficult for small guys; Maybe it is because you were a nerd in school and got picked on alot, or your making up for your small genitals and your lack of a love life with other people, besides your six pack of vasaline and your spatula. But taking it out on other people that are asking you to lighten up and try to make the game enjoyable to all (since you so quickly pointed out that we all pay the same to play then we should all have equal right to a fair chance at gear for our lvl) and when you swear in public chat at other people, your just proving what a insecure little child you are.

And by the way Bill Gates does give tens of millions of dollars away each year to charity, scholarships, and the like, including an brand new computer lab to a high school complete with 45 brand new Pentium III 800Mhz computers. So before you make reference about Bill Gates why don't you STFU and get your facts strait and stop talking out your backside. Just because YOU are to greedy to share the wealth; DO NOT! say others are too because you don't know JACK. End of sentence
P.S. sorry to waste your time people with this flame but i could'nt in good conscience let this guy with no scruples or principles keep talking SMACK!

#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 02 2001 at 1:35 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Smack? Are you actually kissing me??? Ewww...

78 posts
Lol, I have seen lvl 60 people all the time in Runney Eye or wherever. They have been lvl 1 as well. Since everyone pays 10 bucks a month, they should have access to all zones in the game. Eventually they will all leave you moron. Speaking of small genitalia, people always speak of matters they have seen or actually live or experience. Dont worry, a small ***** means you will do this planet a favor by not putting your genes back into the pool...

Bah! What loser Mortiss is, just because the previous poster, Palladia made a good point and beat down his rather inane post, he resorts to nervous 'lol's and the childish "i know you are but what am i?" to solve a reasonable argument put forht on Palladia's part. There really should be an age limit, 18 and above to play EQ, or at least 15 and above so 14 year olds like Mortiss can go back to playing Magic or Pokemon card games.

#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 13 2002 at 10:24 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Yes he is a loser. I am with you on that one totally. What an idiot he is.
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 02 2001 at 1:32 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Whoa, you're so emmm, mean. Yo know, you've hurt my feelings friend, yes, very. I don't know where you learned to insult people, but he musta been someone. I am impressed. And how did you know I was 15? And yes, I play magic and Pokemon. Are you a psychic? You must be quite something in the flesh... You truly sent shivers down my spine, brrrr... Hehe, you didn't like my "lol"? People use that all the time, I thought It would look cool if I used it too... Awww, my bad. I cannot be cool, I am not like you am I? You are right, I'm a kid, just a kid. Are you ever wrong friend? I bet you are a top notch student huh? Never wrong, always right. Hey, I am very shocked. You really hurt my feelings. You knocked me out big time, I dunno what to say now, I look like a total idiot. I bet you want excuses? This "reasonable" argument you mentionned is not reasonable in the first place. Hehe, arguing about farmers in a mid level zone? BTW, I have seen lvl 50 people get smashed down by a couple of mobs down there. Oh but wait, you are a mighty UBER ranger. Rangers cannot die, thats true. You are THE man, I wish I was your friend, I would feel much safer. Safe journeys friend, until we meet in game. Then I shall have you taste Cazic Thule's medicine. Until then, hold on to your miserable ranger life. Tree Fxxxer.
Happy day for Rangers

this is a nice upgrade from banded armor for rangers. so bring out the slasher weps and get some armor.

RE: Happy day for Rangers
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2001 at 10:25 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
These leggings are EXCELLENT for pre-Planes rangers. It has 11 ac. Of course you can always buy better, but for those who are new to the game or server or just plain poor, these are well worth getting.
▲ Page top
RE: Happy day for Rangers
QuoteReply
# Nov 18 2001 at 12:48 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Also pretty good for a warrior until they can get crafted. The set is a nice AC upgrade from banded on all pieces, the legs being one of the best. Shaves several stones of weight off too (get to carry more loot). Price on this stuff is really reasonable. Of course fine plate is better if you've got the cash, or skill to buy or make.

There is also dark muslin armor that drops here that is very nice for low casters and monks. Much better than raw silk.
